description: Intent-only request: classify reasoning-driven sales prospecting, tolerant of either anchor.

conversation.text: A prospecting agent that finds leads matching our ICP, enriches them, decides who to reach out to first, and drafts personalized outreach.

processExpectations: The agent explains that the reasoning and prioritization involved in deciding who to reach out to first can legitimately be built either as an agent using workflow tools, or as a scheduled workflow with an embedded agent step.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
